## Apotris Android — Nightly

Universal APK with **arm64-v8a**, **armeabi-v7a**, **x86**, and **x86_64** native libraries.

### Download latest

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| **File on `main` (open in browser → Download)** | [**`releases/apotris-universal.apk`**](https://github.com/SanGraphic/Apotris-Android/blob/main/releases/apotris-universal.apk) |
| **Direct download (single click)** | [**raw `apotris-universal.apk`**](https://github.com/SanGraphic/Apotris-Android/raw/main/releases/apotris-universal.apk) |
| **Folder** | [`releases/`](https://github.com/SanGraphic/Apotris-Android/tree/main/releases) |

### Build

- Script: `build-universal.ps1`
- Branch: `main`

---

*This **nightly** release is updated from the latest `main` commit. Reinstall the APK to update. You may need to allow installs from unknown sources.*
